title: Statistical Process Control Limit Calculator
description: Calculates control limits for X-bar and R charts based on subgroup data, with process capability analysis and actionable insights per ISO 7870, Six Sigma, and Lean standards.

inputs.label: Subgroup Size (n)
inputs.businessContext: Number of samples per subgroup for X-bar and R charts. Typical values: 3-10.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of samples per subgroup for X-bar and R charts. Typical values: 3-10.
businessContext_i18n.tr: X-bar ve R grafikleri için alt grup başına örnek sayısı. Tipik değerler: 3-10.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Proben pro Untergruppe für X-Quer- und R-Karten. Typische Werte: 3-10.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'échantillons par sous-groupe pour les cartes X-barre et R. Valeurs typiques : 3-10.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de muestras por subgrupo para gráficos X-barra y R. Valores típicos: 3-10.
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدد العينات لكل مجموعة فرعية لمخططي X-bar وR. القيم النموذجية: 3-10.

inputs.label: Number of Subgroups (k)
inputs.businessContext: Total subgroups used to estimate process variation. Minimum 10 for reliable limits.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total subgroups used to estimate process variation. Minimum 10 for reliable limits.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Proses değişkenliğini tahmin etmek için kullanılan toplam alt grup sayısı. Güvenilir limitler için minimum 10.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der Untergruppen zur Schätzung der Prozessstreuung. Mindestens 10 für zuverlässige Grenzen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Total des sous-groupes utilisés pour estimer la variation du processus. Minimum 10 pour des limites fiables.
businessContext_i18n.es: Total de subgrupos utilizados para estimar la variación del proceso. Mínimo 10 para límites fiables.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي المجموعات الفرعية المستخدمة لتقدير تباين العملية. الحد الأدنى 10 للحصول على حدود موثوقة.

inputs.label: Overall Mean (X-double-bar)
inputs.businessContext: Average of subgroup means. Central line for X-bar chart.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average of subgroup means. Central line for X-bar chart.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Alt grup ortalamalarının ortalaması. X-bar grafiği için merkez çizgisi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Mittelwert der Untergruppenmittelwerte. Mittellinie der X-Quer-Karte.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Moyenne des moyennes des sous-groupes. Ligne centrale pour la carte X-barre.
businessContext_i18n.es: Promedio de las medias de los subgrupos. Línea central para el gráfico X-barra.
businessContext_i18n.ar: متوسط متوسطات المجموعات الفرعية. الخط المركزي لمخطط X-bar.

inputs.label: Average Range (R-bar)
inputs.businessContext: Mean of subgroup ranges. Used to estimate process sigma.

businessContext_i18n.en: Mean of subgroup ranges. Used to estimate process sigma.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Alt grup aralıklarının ortalaması. Proses sigmasını tahmin etmek için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Mittelwert der Untergruppenspannweiten. Wird zur Schätzung der Prozess-Sigma verwendet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Moyenne des étendues des sous-groupes. Utilisée pour estimer le sigma du processus.
businessContext_i18n.es: Media de los rangos de los subgrupos. Se utiliza para estimar la sigma del proceso.
businessContext_i18n.ar: متوسط مدى المجموعات الفرعية. يستخدم لتقدير سيجما العملية.

inputs.label: Upper Specification Limit (USL)
inputs.businessContext: Maximum acceptable value per customer or design requirement.

businessContext_i18n.en: Maximum acceptable value per customer or design requirement.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Müşteri veya tasarım gereksinimine göre izin verilen maksimum değer.
businessContext_i18n.de: Maximal akzeptabler Wert gemäß Kunden- oder Konstruktionsanforderung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur maximale acceptable selon le client ou la spécification.
businessContext_i18n.es: Valor máximo aceptable según el cliente o requisito de diseño.
businessContext_i18n.ar: القيمة القصوى المقبولة حسب متطلبات العميل أو التصميم.

inputs.label: Lower Specification Limit (LSL)
inputs.businessContext: Minimum acceptable value per customer or design requirement.

businessContext_i18n.en: Minimum acceptable value per customer or design requirement.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Müşteri veya tasarım gereksinimine göre izin verilen minimum değer.
businessContext_i18n.de: Minimal akzeptabler Wert gemäß Kunden- oder Konstruktionsanforderung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur minimale acceptable selon le client ou la spécification.
businessContext_i18n.es: Valor mínimo aceptable según el cliente o requisito de diseño.
businessContext_i18n.ar: القيمة الدنيا المقبولة حسب متطلبات العميل أو التصميم.

inputs.label: Chart Type
inputs.businessContext: Select control chart type. Xbar-R for small subgroups, Xbar-s for larger, I-MR for individual measurements.

businessContext_i18n.en: Select control chart type. Xbar-R for small subgroups, Xbar-s for larger, I-MR for individual measurements.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kontrol grafiği türünü seçin. Küçük alt gruplar için Xbar-R, büyük alt gruplar için Xbar-s, bireysel ölçümler için I-MR.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wählen Sie den Regelkartentyp. Xbar-R für kleine Untergruppen, Xbar-s für größere, I-MR für Einzelmessungen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Sélectionnez le type de carte de contrôle. Xbar-R pour petits sous-groupes, Xbar-s pour plus grands, I-MR pour mesures individuelles.
businessContext_i18n.es: Seleccione el tipo de gráfico de control. Xbar-R para subgrupos pequeños, Xbar-s para más grandes, I-MR para mediciones individuales.
businessContext_i18n.ar: اختر نوع مخطط التحكم. Xbar-R للمجموعات الفرعية الصغيرة، Xbar-s للمجموعات الأكبر، I-MR للقياسات الفردية.

inputs.label: Use Estimated Sigma from R-bar
inputs.businessContext: If true, sigma is estimated from R-bar/d2. If false, use pooled standard deviation.

label_i18n.fr: Utiliser l'écart-type estimé à partir de R-bar
label_i18n.es: Usar sigma estimada a partir de R-barra

businessContext_i18n.en: If true, sigma is estimated from R-bar/d2. If false, use pooled standard deviation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Doğruysa, sigma R-bar/d2'den tahmin edilir. Yanlışsa, havuzlanmış standart sapma kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wenn wahr, wird Sigma aus R-Balken/d2 geschätzt. Wenn falsch, wird die gepoolte Standardabweichung verwendet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Si vrai, l'écart-type est estimé à partir de R-bar/d2. Si faux, utiliser l'écart-type poolé.
businessContext_i18n.es: Si es verdadero, la sigma se estima a partir de R-barra/d2. Si es falso, se usa la desviación estándar combinada.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إذا كان صحيحًا، يتم تقدير سيغما من R-bar/d2. إذا كان خطأ، استخدم الانحراف المعياري المجمع.

rules.message: Subgroup size must be between 2 and 25.
At least 10 subgroups required for reliable limits.
LSL must be less than USL.
Overall mean should be within specification limits for capable process.
Average range must be greater than zero.

thresholds.message: Process capability (Cpk) below 1.33. Process not capable per Six Sigma standards.
Process capability (Cpk) below 1.0. Immediate improvement required.
Process performance (Ppk) below 1.33. Long-term capability insufficient.
One or more points beyond control limits. Process out of statistical control.

hiddenLossDrivers: Out-of-control points not detected in real time
suggestedActions: Plot X-bar and R charts weekly
Investigate any point beyond control limits within 24 hours
